stage: Sprint 4 Lever 1 — d3 recipe on FPPC-MLM-adapted Snowflake
hypothesis: Continued MLM pretraining of Snowflake on the FPPC corpus should reshape the latent space so that statute-keyword queries (q001-class) cluster with their relevant opinions. The downstream d3 contrastive recipe (MNRL on pos_conclusion_only, LR=1e-6, 1 epoch) should then transfer its previous gains on COI/fact_pattern while picking up the new statute-relevance signal.
